name: Schema Validation Skill
description: Validate and debug Zod schemas in connectors
content:
When debugging schema validation failures:
1. Check regex patterns match expected format
2. Verify nullable fields have explicit null handling
3. Test boundary conditions (max string length, integer range)
4. Use zod().parse() to get detailed error messages

name: Connector Testing Skill
description: Unit test patterns for polyfill connectors
content: Use the subprocess harness for integration tests. Mock filesystem and SQLite readers. Test each parser function independently before combining in the runtime walker. Validate JSONL output matches schemas before emitting RECORD events.
